task.title: SeaweedFS Object Storage Setup
task.description: Deploy SeaweedFS for S3-compatible object storage of attachments and exports

implementation.details:
1. Deploy SeaweedFS master, volume, and filer components
2. Configure S3 gateway for compatibility
3. Create buckets for attachments, exports, media
4. Set up access policies and credentials
5. Configure backup retention

task.acceptance_criteria: SeaweedFS is running, S3 API responds, can create/delete objects in test bucket using AWS CLI
